hero.title: ENERGYWILD
hero.card_energy_desc: Brings together soil/water regeneration in arid zones and distributed energy generation.
hero.card_ip_desc: Technical documentation under CC BY-NC-ND 4.0. Code under MIT.
hero.card_status_desc: Complete technical documentation. Physical validation pending for the BSLC prototype and its measurement protocol.
hero.note_split: Important: BSLC shares the acronym but refers to two separate systems — BSLC Magnetic Generator (electricity generation) and BSLC Regeneration System / PIRS-1 (territorial regeneration).

components.title: Project components
components.pirs_desc: Integrated system for water harvesting, regenerative agriculture and energy microgrids in isolated rural areas.
components.bslc_desc: Electric generator by magnetic commutation with magnet pattern optimization and intelligent control.
components.nexus_desc: Node network architecture with ML/optimization, datasets and multi-layer design objectives.

pirs.title: PIRS-1 — Regeneration documentation
pirs.intro: Recommended reading order and document location.

bslc.title: BSLC Magnetic Generator
bslc.intro: Concept, diagrams, specifications and experimental validation path.

nexus.title: NEXUS RISING — Deep Study & ML
nexus.card_deep_desc: Research framework: sacred geometries, resonant frequencies, semantic analysis and reinforcement learning for commutation.
nexus.card_ml_desc: Synthetic datasets preparation, JSON schema, CSV for training, and triple cross validation (simulation / theory / measurement).
nexus.card_mat_desc: Optimization of magnetic materials, coatings, resistive networks and field geometry for torque and efficiency.

prototyping.title: Prototyping and validation
prototyping.intro: The experimental roadmap rests on two levels:
prototyping.level0_desc: Cost 50–100 €. Validate whether the magnetic field produces measurable torque with 1 coil and 1 magnet.
prototyping.level1_desc: Cost 200–400 €. Measure RPM, torque and efficiency with 3 coils and a 3-magnet rotor.
prototyping.level2_desc: Cost 500–800 €. Measure P_out vs P_in. Determine self-sustainability.
prototyping.note_protocol: Pass / fail criteria: see measurement protocol.

license.title: License and intellectual property
license.code_desc: Programming files and scripts: MIT. Reuse allowed with attribution.
license.docs_desc: Technical specifications, diagrams, conceptual models and know-how: CC BY-NC-ND 4.0.
